beIN SPORTS 5.title_fr: Leeds United vs Norwich City - Emirates FA Cup 2025-26 - Journée 5
beIN SPORTS 5.desc_ar: Leeds have lost two of their last 15 meetings with Norwich in all competitions, on both occasions losing to current manager Daniel Farke when he was Canaries boss in April 2018 and February 2019. This is the fourth FA Cup tie between Leeds and Norwich – the Canaries went through in a fourth round replay in 1934-35, while the Whites won 5-0 in a third round second replay in 1972-73 and then 5-2 in the third round in 1976-77.

beIN SPORTS 5.desc_ar: Brentford have won seven of their 10 games against West Ham United in all competitions since becoming a Premier League side in 2021 ; they haven’t beaten a side more often during that period. This is just the third time that West Ham and Brentford have been drawn against each other in the FA Cup – the Bees progressed in a fourth round replay in 1926-27 while the Hammers won 1-0 in the third round in 2022-23 via a Saïd Benrahma strike.

beIN 4K.title_en: Wolverhampton Wanderers vs. Liverpool - English Premier League 2026/2027
beIN 4K.title_fr: Wolverhampton Wanderers contre Liverpool - Premier League anglaise 2026/2027
beIN 4K.desc_ar: Wolves have lost 17 of their last 18 Premier League matches against Liverpool, winning the other 3-0 in February 2023 at Molineux under Julen Lopetegui. Liverpool have won 83% of their Premier League games against Wolves, winning 19 of 23 games  – that is the best win ratio of any side to face another 20+ times in the competition’s history.

beIN 4K.title_en: Newcastle United vs. Manchester United - English Premier League 2026/2027
beIN 4K.title_fr: Newcastle United contre Manchester United - Premier League anglaise 2026/2027
beIN 4K.desc_ar: Newcastle United have won their last three home Premier League matches against Manchester United, as many as in their previous 18 combined. The Magpies last had a longer home league winning run against the Red Devils between 1915 and 1931. Man Utd are looking to record a Premier League double over Newcastle for the first time since the 2020-21 campaign; they won 1-0 on Boxing Day thanks to a goal from Patrick Dorgu.

beIN 4K.desc_ar: Tottenham Hotspur have won 16 of their last 21 Premier League matches against Crystal Palace, although they have lost two of their last three against the Eagles. They have never won consecutive away league games against Spurs.

This topic transcends generations, cultures, and nationalities, as fans passionately defend their favorites and recount unforgettable moments on the pitch. beIN SPORTS EN 1.desc_ar: Galatasaray have only lost one of their last nine home games against English clubs in all European competition, going down 1-4 to Arsenal in December 2014. They have already beaten Liverpool 1-0 at home in this season's competition. Liverpool have won just one of five previous UEFA Champions League meetings with Galatasaray, a win rate of 20% - their joint-lowest against any side they have faced 5+ times in the competition.

beIN SPORTS EN 1.desc_ar: Newcastle United have faced Barcelona five times before in Europe, each coming in the UEFA Champions League. The Magpies’ only victory came in the first clash, 3-2 at home in the Group Stages in September 1997, with Barca winning each of the following four games. Barcelona have faced English opposition 33 times in the knockout stages of the UEFA Champions League, winning 10 of their last 12 matches since 2014.
